title: RM-S, LN, Elegoo Live Stream Extravaganza #elegoo #neptune
description:
As part of Elegoo's product launch, Rob and Luke are unboxing and setting up the brand new Saturn and Neptune printers. Join them - and join in!  Superchat has been enabled if you want to be top of the list!
You can get to the new products here  https://www.elegoo.com/pages/elegoo-new-arrivals-2023
If you want to have a look at RM-S' special videos, become a member and join by clicking this link https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC4AkVj-qnJxNtKuz3rkq16A/join
